_meta.title: Elegoo SDCP (Centauri Carbon 1) — integer Cmd catalog + result/error codes
_meta.confidence: 🟡 source-read (Elegoo first-party SDK); 🔵 crash-on-partial-start behaviour community-confirmed

derived_from.section: Writing / control — SDCP (CC1) integer Cmd codes
derived_from.source_note: Clean-room from `elegoo-link`. Command params described as facts; no code copied.

notes: ⚠️ Sending a Cmd the firmware does not know can crash the daemon and kill an active print — only probe speculative Cmds when idle (CurrentStatus == 0).
⚠️ The START command (128) MUST carry all six inner fields; a partial start crashes the firmware.
There is NO live temperature / fan / light / motion / speed write on CC1 — those exist only as commented-out SDK stubs. Do not emit them.
Upload-and-hold is native: run the upload sequence and simply skip Cmd 128.

commands.name: STATUS
commands.note: force a sdcp/status refresh; also the keepalive/poll floor

commands.name: START
commands.note: ⚠️ send ALL six fields; result at response Ack (see start_ack)

commands.name: RESUME
commands.note: CC1 DOES have a live resume (unlike CC2, which does not)

commands.name: GET_CANVAS
commands.note: read the CANVAS feeder; empty body; not in the status push

slot_map_element.comment: print-time color->slot assignment inside START; snake_case on the wire (the SDK's camelCase {t,trayId,canvasId} is internal-only)

start_ack.comment: the START (128) result, delivered inline at the response's `Ack` field. Confirm launch by state (sdcp/status -> PRINTING), not the ack alone.

error_number.comment: a separate file/launch error field `ErrorNumber` in the status/PrintInfo block; any non-zero is an error

upload.comment: step 1 of launch — chunked multipart to the same :3030 server

fields.S-File-MD5: whole-file MD5 hex (same on every chunk)
fields.Uuid: one value for the whole transfer

upload.settle: ~1s REQUIRED delay after the last chunk before sending Cmd 128 (lets the firmware close the file handle)
